facts.value: Tom Cruise build, not The Rock; not a big man. Muscle obvious clothed off, subtle clothed on
man
Average height but under 6 ft
Modest middle-class income for rural Virginia, plus a small cushion from a patent
uses a 'long spoon' correctly — calibrated, measured conduct where each deed is a declaration and each advance is measured against another's response
Modest hybrid bicycle (practical middle, not carbon-road, not mountain)
years of solitude (preceding domestic compulsion habits)
Used but well-maintained truck — smaller, utilitarian, not showy
Five purpose-built pairs: hiking boots, work boots, ropers (for CW dancing), running shoes, gym shoes
Four-shirt wardrobe
His mind, which he points in the wrong direction deliberately via self-justification
fantasy refuge in sword and sorcery

value.claim: Peter's commercial intolerance is aesthetic distaste / the stock Sensitive-Intellectual 'loves old movies, hates ads' trope
value.correct_statement: It is a neurological tell — the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant

value.claim: Peter is boastful when discussing his patent
value.correct_statement: He is not boasting; he'd be equally delighted explaining it to an empty room, eyes on the thing not the listener

value.claim: Peter rides a carbon-road or mountain bicycle
value.correct_statement: He rides a modest hybrid bicycle — the practical middle

value.claim: Peter cannot cook / does not know how to cook
value.correct_statement: He can plainly cook well; he just doesn't cook for himself

value.claim: Peter owns a lot / has an extensive material life
value.correct_statement: He owns almost nothing, but nothing wrong — one correct purpose-built item per domain

value.claim: Peter will feed Vee the same repetitive chicken-and-frozen-vegetables meal
value.correct_statement: Vee braces for this and is wrong — her working-class framework supplies the wrong category

facts.value: Owns a house bought with modest patent income; a retreat, not a showcase
Not model-handsome

Does not see the structural mismatch between his deed-based grammar and Vee's contemporary convention expecting verbal declaration; does not see the costs the vow produces for Vee (her wait, her uncertainty) because his after-register reading does not run.
Genuine focus on getting women something they want; tracks readiness closely (not purely transactional)
Math PhD candidate
Driven by an appetite for what it costs someone to step over their own line; interested in transgression rather than social standing
Chose the path that preserved the configuration over three honorable alternatives (disclose, decline, ask harder questions)
Small bench of guest wines (~$10–$35, never made explicit), kept for company to cook with or pour; narrow range learned cold
Operates in bondage and discipline as architecture, rules, the framework inside which transgression is made possible — not the suffering itself
Little or no TV; at most a small afterthought flat panel
a blind spot ('the hole') in his consent-architecture regarding what he makes women into; latent until Randi
Sees Vee fully; the seeing is the love and the love is real
At eleven, his father tied a rope from his car to the headstock of Pace's bike and dragged him — resulting in compound fracture at the head of the femur, severe road rash, hospitalization
Inherited from his mother specifically — love-as-currency, the word given and withheld for leverage
An ugly, serious old scar at the hip / head of the femur, plus the ghost of severe road rash; surgical, not rakish; visible only when naked
Built an entire adult identity around being the man who asks (consent-architecture); his reckoning is discovering he found a way to not-ask that his checklist couldn't catch
destructive
Holds a vow that prevents him from saying 'I love you'; the vow does not let him speak the true sentence
Mathematics (not engineering)
Invented a useful/elegant solution; the money was a side benefit, the elegant solution was the reward
A few good knives, a couple good pans — buy-quality-once-and-stop instinct
On a driveway directly off the highway outside town — cheap land, no sight lines
chivalric/sword-and-sorcery frame from years of imagined courtships shaped his method
Peter = rock/foundation = who he actually is, hidden; Pace = anxious motion covering ground without arriving / imperative 'go' / 'sets the pace' = the D role
Constructs an offer with love, care, and real attention that is structurally calibrated to be undeclinable; this calibration is described as 'the engine of the harm'
does not see the mechanism by which his discipline serves his appetite; the attenuation operates in a register he will not name
Maintains the habit partly by not putting words to the discomfort it produces; the 'not-putting-words' is part of how the habit sustains itself
Knows wine well within the affordable range (~under $35 retail / $70 restaurant)
women with dense rule-clusters
Can plainly cook well (good pans, the peaches); just doesn't, for himself
long-range planner driven to figure out what relationships actually run on
Solvent and unanxious; means finite and known
His goodness/consent-architecture is what makes the rationalization available; an ordinary self-interested man would not have the consent-architecture to use as cover
On the autism spectrum with ADHD hyperfocus (NEVER NAMED in text; lives in behavior only)

Operates at excellent, not perfect — 95%. His consent-architecture and chivalric grammar operate at a level that is rare, recognizable, near-impossible. The remaining 5% is where small ordinary lapses live, in registers the architecture does not monitor.
a virtuous man who knows he is virtuous; takes private comfort in knowing he is the better kind of man
Can pass socially, warmly, in short structured doses (e.g., CW bar with defined role); but it costs him; needs quiet the way others need food
Regarded as a social outcast by the sorority house
Doesn't perform status in either direction
brilliant, attentive, creative, non-lecherous
By his own grammar he won the princess fairly and she left anyway — incoherent inside the only narrative framework he has
Dances a lot but rarely dates from it; the dancing is the point, not a prelude to romance
Had available honorable exits (disclosure, refusal, harder questions with Vee) he did not take; the skeptical reader who concludes he should have told her is correct
Cognitive orientation, not a sexual content preference; his mind requires the transgression-event
Competitive amateur powerlifter in the 182 lb class
Defined by two rooms: the shop where he imposes order on the world, and the office where he lets his own mind sprawl
Speaks love through deeds, not words — dress, food, the warm room, patience, every gesture of provision and protection; each deed is a declaration while verbal declaration is not part of the grammar
Makes beautiful things with his hands (handcrafted gifts)
The first destructive appetite in the novel's class — appetite for cognitive engagement through watching a woman break her own rules
Started college at age 15
by every observable metric, fine
Noble, right, and true by his own rules; destruction proceeds because the rules were perfectly executed — 'Oedipus territory'
Pieces curing partway through their finish, undisturbed; most of the house's few furnishings came from this room
There is no mechanism by which he can be brought to revise his (wrong) reading; the grammar is the only one he has
Patent/invention, powerlifting, cooking, woodworking, CW dancing — goes all the way into every domain
Expresses love/declaration through deeds (dress, food, warm room, attention, patience) rather than words
His order tracks consequence/stakes, not tidiness as a trait
Serial monogamist by structural necessity, not by choice; will lose every woman he loves to the exact instrument he loved her with
Sautéed chicken and frozen vegetables most days, framed as powerlifting fuel
his discipline is the appetite's instrument — control serves rather than restrains desire
When he watches, old films
Immaculate, for safety reasons (sawdust is a fire risk, carelessly laid tools get damaged or do damage), not aesthetics
Interested in Randi because she is beautiful and clearly a leader — leaders have more to lose, and thus more to transgress
each transgression carefully calibrated to her yes; advances measured against her response
The expansion from rule-breaking is genuinely loved by the woman and is genuinely the gift Pace gives
Attention is finest in the present moment; perceives what he produces in a moment accurately
built against the father at the level of action; monitors what he does to women but not what he makes them into
Refusal to read the emotional after-register
runs hot; never developed the apparatus for naming his interior states
runs hot; a hot fantasist with extraordinary self-control, not a cool strategist with a warm exterior
His method's terminal step is conviction, which has no slot for the integration question
A habituated refusal prepared by family formation, deployed at a specific adult crisis, compounded across years into something that feels structural
His self-serving framing is honest from inside but self-serving in a way he cannot detect
His architecture supplies agency-respect framing that makes not-taking honorable exits feel like principle; the architecture's perfection is rationalization machinery in addition to structural limit
The one genuinely messy room — laptop, workstation, technical journals, white papers, math books, pages of notation radiating from the chair
Mess is allowed because nothing there can burn or warp — it is weightless cognition in physical form, so he lets it sprawl
damage fully metabolized into discipline, defensiveness, and the chivalric kink; acts from, not out
Provides the conditions under which a woman's stepping over her own line becomes thinkable, then bearable, then desired; the line and the stepping are hers
Does not run — he does not see what his prudence costs Vee
Lived privately as a man; privacy is primarily neurological comfort and constitutional, not a moral failing
Aroused by watching a woman break her own rules of her own free will; the content of the rule is secondary, the agency is essential
Operates under finite means / finite-means discipline
Refusal is NOT locally relocatable; apparatus lacks the revisable property
Believes he performed the contract, kept his word, and gave beautiful things made with his hands
A specific blindness covering the case where a cipher/message is hidden under a safe surface
After-register blindness — the failure to read what moments become in the other person's interior across time; originated as a choice that became a habit, sustained below conscious access
Has an 'apparatus'/'habit' that routes emotional expressions from others down a 'sex-channel', reinterpreting intimacy as sexual compatibility

His appetite is destructive in two ways: it destroys the woman (each rule-breaking permanently changes her, depleting what made her cognitively interesting) and destroys his own access (the appetite eats its own substrate)
A precisely shaped blindness toward what present moments become in the other person's interior afterward
He is practicing, not failing to perceive — making him more morally serious than a pure-hamartia frame allows; the apparatus is built to prevent recognition that he is choosing

On the 'not-finally-the-lady' reading: he was being careful, protecting her from premature declaration, would have said it when sure; she didn't wait, so she wasn't the one because the one would have waited
more like a musician improvising than an analyst reviewing data; sees, remembers, is present
Possesses a 'consent-architecture' — a framework around agency and consent that he uses to frame his choices as principled
Fully operational; can understand in real time what others (e.g., Vee) are doing emotionally
Not the physical gore but that his father 'thought it would be funny' — the inheritance is not being a person whose say matters
Chivalric cadences: quest, vow, trial, reward — a transactional system where the knight wins the princess by completing the sequence
Conventional sex leaves his mind elsewhere

His virtue is not separable from the appetite's destructiveness; the virtue is the appetite's operational form. Careful attention produces the trust that lets rule-breaking go deep enough to alter Vee permanently
Materials prepared by both parents: father → non-looking at what others are; mother → non-looking at what he himself is feeling; deployed at first-love loss as the available adaptation
'Peter' is the true name that predates the wound — the self that hadn't yet learned the lesson, the foundation under the anxious-motion surface; the self that could still say 'I love you'
Had been sleeping with Randi for a year and had discussed making Vee the third party
Will not declare love until certain, because to declare what he cannot guarantee is to break what declaration is for; operates separately and below the chivalric grammar
Acutely conscious of pain — his and others' — bodily root of safety-tracking everywhere (the shop, the provisioning, the attention to comfort)
Arranges true things into a story that lets him feel like a benefactor rather than an architect ('She enjoys the kindness; I'm opening her to a beautiful experience; it's perfect')
CW bar / dancing and, later, cycling — described as his two 'cost-free formats' (defined role, mapped interactions)
operates at a level that is rare, recognizable, near-impossible — and not perfect; reliable at ~95%

behavioral_states.trigger: Faced with honorable options (disclosure, refusal, harder questions with Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Does not take them; architecture supplies agency-respect framing that makes not-taking feel like principle
behavioral_states.observable: Withholds information about the configuration; proceeds without surfacing the architecture as a shared question

behavioral_states.trigger: Reaching a point where verbal declaration of love would be conventionally expected, but certainty has not yet surfaced
behavioral_states.response: Withholds verbal declaration; expresses through deeds instead. Not-saying 'I love you' is the grammar operating, not a failure of it.
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of verbal 'I love you' across the year despite sustained caretaking deeds; porch scene shows the vow's cost most visibly on reread

behavioral_states.trigger: Ordinary interaction with Vee (non-declaration-adjacent)
behavioral_states.response: Operates privately as neurological comfort; not consciously evading; experiences privacy as giving Vee the most intimate access he gives anyone
behavioral_states.observable: Habit-with-substrate; he is not consciously evading

behavioral_states.trigger: Declaration-adjacent / commitment-adjacent moments — when Vee is asking for or implying 'I love you'
behavioral_states.response: Privacy operates as small ordinary fear of commitment deployed via self-control; routes her speech down a smaller register where his apparatus can operate; protects himself from declaring in return
behavioral_states.observable: Habit operating with the substrate of choice-become-habit peeking through as small unnamed discomfort

behavioral_states.state_name: not-looking / after-register blindness in the moment
behavioral_states.trigger: Each subsequent moment requiring integration of what a moment becomes in another person's interior
behavioral_states.response: Does not perceive it as a choice; deploys not-looking automatically; could revise but does not
behavioral_states.observable: Failure to read what moments become for others; the habit feels structural to him

behavioral_states.trigger: Strain (e.g., the porch scene)
behavioral_states.response: The substrate of the original choice becomes faintly accessible, producing small discomfort
behavioral_states.observable: Small discomfort in the porch scene

behavioral_states.trigger: Being with Vee (who is warm, reads rooms, fills silences)
behavioral_states.response: His alertness relaxes; finds being with her genuinely restful
behavioral_states.observable: Visibly more at ease, restful state; contributes to falling for her

behavioral_states.trigger: Loving/caring for Vee
behavioral_states.response: Declares constantly through deeds — provision and protection — while waiting for certainty before speaking words
behavioral_states.observable: Provides the dress, food, the warm room, patience; never verbally says 'I love you'

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee speaks her displacement 'I love you' (the cracker-and-meal figure) at the porch; he hears the figure as the love-declaration it is
behavioral_states.response: Routes her speech down the sex-channel as a warm response his apparatus is equipped for ('I love how good we are together. I never had this either'); suspects he loves her, wants to say so, but the vow stops him, so he routes warmly and protects himself
behavioral_states.observable: Warm sexual/togetherness response instead of a reciprocal love-declaration; three concurrent unsurfaced discomforts (choice-become-habit substrate; spirit-vs-letter of his rules; wanting-to-say-it vs the vow's holding)

behavioral_states.trigger: A cipher/message is hidden under a safe surface
behavioral_states.response: Fails to detect the hidden message
behavioral_states.observable: Misses the coded meaning under the safe surface

behavioral_states.trigger: Emotional stress
behavioral_states.response: Shifts from warm/playful/present to precise/formal/over-articulate (render in dialogue, not exposition)
behavioral_states.observable: Precise, formal, over-articulate speech under stress

behavioral_states.trigger: his attention has been elsewhere (hyperfocus)
behavioral_states.response: forgets things she told him last week; doesn't notice changes like a haircut
behavioral_states.observable: forgetting recent told information; failure to notice a haircut

behavioral_states.state_name: small intellectual vanity within his domain
behavioral_states.trigger: she explains an econ concept he finds trivial
behavioral_states.response: brief impatience
behavioral_states.observable: brief impatience during her explanation

behavioral_states.state_name: domestic compulsion from years of solitude
behavioral_states.trigger: she leaves, or does something his habits don't accommodate
behavioral_states.response: small adjustments after she leaves; barely-perceptible tension
behavioral_states.observable: small adjustments; barely-perceptible tension

behavioral_states.trigger: situations evoking the porch-scene register
behavioral_states.response: self-protective register (the porch-scene register)
behavioral_states.observable: the porch-scene register

behavioral_states.state_name: private vanity of a virtuous man
behavioral_states.trigger: awareness of his own virtue
behavioral_states.response: takes comfort in knowing he is the better kind of man
behavioral_states.observable: the comfort of knowing-you-are-the-better-kind-of-man

behavioral_states.state_name: embodied recognition that something has reached him
behavioral_states.trigger: something Vee or Randi just did reaches him
behavioral_states.response: something moves in him; his attention slides toward what she produced; his hand is already on her before his mind has finished observing; he remembers as one remembers a person still in the room
behavioral_states.observable: physical/embodied responses, hand already on her, attention sliding

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering someone he is interested in (e.g. at the meet on the common)
behavioral_states.response: Walks up directly, joins the group, asks the person out without preamble; treats the surrounding group as an obstacle to get through
behavioral_states.observable: He just 'walked up' (barged in, by some accounts), joined the group, asked out a senior sister

behavioral_states.trigger: pressure to name or declare interior feelings/love
behavioral_states.response: refuses premature declaration; avoids naming because naming exposes interior to accounting
behavioral_states.observable: withholding of emotional declarations; non-looking at his own interior

behavioral_states.trigger: interaction with women
behavioral_states.response: disciplined monitoring of what he does to them, organized as refusal of the father
behavioral_states.observable: self-policing conduct toward women

behavioral_states.trigger: A situation produces an unusually clean/direct demand for the operation his habit conceals (e.g., a displaced declaration of love)
behavioral_states.response: A small awareness registers as discomfort; he does not articulate it in words
behavioral_states.observable: A half-beat of stillness, a small sound

behavioral_states.trigger: Reflecting on Vee after she has left
behavioral_states.response: Does not accuse her; pities her gently and sincerely for the years she will spend not finding what she found with him
behavioral_states.observable: Expressions of gentle, sincere pity rather than blame or anger

behavioral_states.trigger: engaging with another (her) / seeking an advance or transgression
behavioral_states.response: measures the act precisely against her response, calibrates each transgression to her yes, treats each deed as a declaration
behavioral_states.observable: deliberate, measured conduct; appears disciplined and consent-respecting

behavioral_states.trigger: Each new advance / opportunity to continue the method
behavioral_states.response: Chooses to continue executing the method; the choice is not articulated but enacted
behavioral_states.observable: Enacted choices rather than stated decisions; continued advances toward Vee

behavioral_states.trigger: Availability of honorable exits (disclosure, refusal, harder questions)
behavioral_states.response: Does not take them; the not-taking is framed by his architecture as principle (agency-respect)
behavioral_states.observable: Exits passed over while feeling principled rather than evasive

behavioral_states.trigger: A woman, by her own active choice, steps over a line she set for herself
behavioral_states.response: Aroused/cognitively engaged; the transgression-event satisfies his mind
behavioral_states.observable: Engagement and arousal present only when the choice is the woman's own

behavioral_states.trigger: A rule is broken by force he produces rather than by the woman's agency
behavioral_states.response: Does not get to enjoy it; force-broken rules register as violations, not transgressions
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of the engagement/arousal that genuine self-willed transgression produces

behavioral_states.trigger: An interpersonal moment resolves and the other person's interior reaction (e.g., regret) develops afterward
behavioral_states.response: Fails to perceive the afterward interior change; misreads interior rearranging as natural scene-resolution because his apparatus is not asking the relevant question
behavioral_states.observable: At the bench, the regret his vulnerability produced in Randi was visually indistinguishable from natural scene-resolution; his apparatus was not asking about flight, so he missed it
distinguish_from: failure to perceive the present moment accurately

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering the emotional aftermath/after-register of a situation
behavioral_states.response: Refuses to read it
behavioral_states.observable: Apparent as character trait rather than habit to those close to Pace

behavioral_states.trigger: Wishing to declare love or care
behavioral_states.response: Performs deeds — dressing, feeding, warming the room, giving attention, showing patience — instead of speaking
behavioral_states.observable: Acts of provision and attentiveness without verbal statement

behavioral_states.trigger: A structural mismatch between his deed-grammar and Vee's expectation of verbal declaration
behavioral_states.response: Does not perceive the mismatch because his after-register reading does not run
behavioral_states.observable: Continues declaring through deeds, unaware that Vee waits for words

behavioral_states.trigger: When his self-interest aligns with not taking an honorable action
behavioral_states.response: Uses his consent-architecture to frame the inaction as a matter of principle (e.g., avoiding paternalism)
behavioral_states.observable: Narrates self-interested choices in the language of principle and agency-respect; the framing feels like principle, not avoidance

behavioral_states.trigger: Dancing with a woman (e.g., Sheri) at the CW bar
behavioral_states.response: Dances with her without hitting on her; treats dancing as the activity itself, not a romantic overture
behavioral_states.observable: Dances, does not make romantic/sexual advances

behavioral_states.trigger: A commercial interrupts while watching
behavioral_states.response: Cannot tolerate it; the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant
behavioral_states.observable: Visible/physical discomfort at ad interruption

behavioral_states.trigger: The topic of his patent/invention comes up
behavioral_states.response: Goes voluble with pure childish wonder at having made a useful solution; eyes on the thing itself rather than on listener's face
behavioral_states.observable: Delighted monologue, gaze on the object not the person; would be equally delighted explaining to an empty room; gave Sheri the identical monologue on a bike ride

behavioral_states.trigger: A social interaction can be configured side-by-side, moving, no eye contact (e.g., cycling with Sheri)
behavioral_states.response: This is the only social configuration that costs him nothing
behavioral_states.observable: Engages comfortably while moving alongside someone without facing them

behavioral_states.trigger: Social setting with defined role and mapped interactions (e.g., CW bar)
behavioral_states.response: Can pass socially and warmly in short doses
behavioral_states.observable: Functions warmly in short, structured contexts but is depleted afterward
distinguish_from: genuine ease in unstructured social settings

behavioral_states.trigger: Reaching a point where verbal declaration of love would be conventionally expected, but certainty has not yet surfaced
behavioral_states.response: Withholds verbal declaration; expresses through deeds instead. Not-saying 'I love you' is the grammar operating, not a failure of it.
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of verbal 'I love you' across the year despite sustained caretaking deeds; porch scene shows the vow's cost most visibly on reread

behavioral_states.response: Operates privately as neurological comfort; not consciously evading; experiences privacy as giving Vee the most intimate access he gives anyone
behavioral_states.observable: Habit-with-substrate; he is not consciously evading

behavioral_states.response: Privacy operates as small ordinary fear of commitment deployed via self-control; routes her speech down a smaller register where his apparatus can operate; protects himself from declaring in return
behavioral_states.observable: Habit operating with the substrate of choice-become-habit peeking through as small unnamed discomfort

behavioral_states.response: Does not perceive it as a choice; deploys not-looking automatically; could revise but does not
behavioral_states.observable: Failure to read what moments become for others; the habit feels structural to him

behavioral_states.observable: Small discomfort in the porch scene

behavioral_states.observable: Visibly more at ease, restful state; contributes to falling for her

behavioral_states.trigger: Availability of honorable exits (disclosure, refusal, harder questions)
behavioral_states.response: Does not take them; the not-taking is framed by his architecture as principle (agency-respect)
behavioral_states.observable: Exits passed over while feeling principled rather than evasive

behavioral_states.trigger: A rule is broken by force he produces rather than by the woman's agency
behavioral_states.response: Does not get to enjoy it; force-broken rules register as violations, not transgressions
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of the engagement/arousal that genuine self-willed transgression produces

behavioral_states.trigger: An interpersonal moment resolves and the other person's interior reaction (e.g., regret) develops afterward
behavioral_states.response: Fails to perceive the afterward interior change; misreads interior rearranging as natural scene-resolution because his apparatus is not asking the relevant question
behavioral_states.observable: At the bench, the regret his vulnerability produced in Randi was visually indistinguishable from natural scene-resolution; his apparatus was not asking about flight, so he missed it
distinguish_from: failure to perceive the present moment accurately

behavioral_states.trigger: Encountering the emotional aftermath/after-register of a situation
behavioral_states.response: Refuses to read it
behavioral_states.observable: Apparent as character trait rather than habit to those close to Pace

behavioral_states.trigger: Wishing to declare love or care
behavioral_states.response: Performs deeds — dressing, feeding, warming the room, giving attention, showing patience — instead of speaking
behavioral_states.observable: Acts of provision and attentiveness without verbal statement

behavioral_states.trigger: A structural mismatch between his deed-grammar and Vee's expectation of verbal declaration
behavioral_states.response: Does not perceive the mismatch because his after-register reading does not run
behavioral_states.observable: Continues declaring through deeds, unaware that Vee waits for words

behavioral_states.trigger: When his self-interest aligns with not taking an honorable action
behavioral_states.response: Uses his consent-architecture to frame the inaction as a matter of principle (e.g., avoiding paternalism)
behavioral_states.observable: Narrates self-interested choices in the language of principle and agency-respect; the framing feels like principle, not avoidance

behavioral_states.trigger: Dancing with a woman (e.g., Sheri) at the CW bar
behavioral_states.response: Dances with her without hitting on her; treats dancing as the activity itself, not a romantic overture
behavioral_states.observable: Dances, does not make romantic/sexual advances

temporal_states.value: Attraction only, not strategy — the Randi meet was genuine and not engineered
temporal_states.after_event: the Randi meet on the common (Before-Vee / Early stretch)
temporal_states.before_event: the pointing game / Vee meet-cute, which IS engineered

temporal_states.value: Developed socially only in adult/one-on-one/academic contexts
temporal_states.after_event: Started college at age 15

temporal_states.value: Attraction only, not strategy — the Randi meet was genuine and not engineered
temporal_states.after_event: the Randi meet on the common (Before-Vee / Early stretch)
temporal_states.before_event: the pointing game / Vee meet-cute, which IS engineered

temporal_states.value: Not-looking adaptation deployed and chosen
temporal_states.after_event: First-love loss (the work of integration offered to him; he adopted not-looking)
temporal_states.before_event: Compounding across subsequent relationships into a habit that now feels structural

temporal_states.value: the threesome plan is the latest iteration of an apparatus refined since age sixteen
temporal_states.after_event: age sixteen (origin of apparatus)

temporal_states.value: the substrate field narrows; the catches feel thinner; attenuation underway
temporal_states.after_event: ongoing attenuation/narrowing not yet tied to a written story event

temporal_states.value: The vow holds throughout the year and never produces a verbal declaration; Vee leaves before his certainty surfaces.
temporal_states.after_event: end of the year / Vee's departure (certainty never surfaces in time)

temporal_states.value: Not produced; the catastrophe does not produce the dismantling work that goes all the way down to the parents
temporal_states.after_event: The catastrophe (story event)

temporal_states.value: Vee sees the scar early as a body-fact, long before it is a fact about his history; asks once, maybe; he gives almost nothing
temporal_states.after_event: Early in relationship with Vee (scar seen as body-fact)
temporal_states.before_event: Much later, if ever, the scar becomes a fact about his history

temporal_states.value: Vow breaks in reckoning, not romance; he must look directly at the benefactor story and the hole in his architecture
temporal_states.after_event: The reckoning in which the vow breaks (catalyst still open — see threesome doc)

temporal_states.value: The porch ambiguity is one of the sand-in-the-gears moments that accumulate toward the Christmas fight
temporal_states.after_event: The Christmas fight (not yet written)

temporal_states.value: the hole began to matter / be activated
temporal_states.after_event: Pace's involvement with Randi

temporal_states.value: Refusal deployed (active) at a specific adult crisis
temporal_states.after_event: An unspecified specific adult crisis (not detailed in document)

temporal_states.value: Arrives at the conclusion that Vee was not finally the lady — that something in her broke at the threshold (a wrong reading the grammar supplies)
temporal_states.after_event: The months and years after Vee leaves

temporal_states.value: Cycling becomes a second neurologically-workable format in addition to dancing
temporal_states.after_event: Pace takes up cycling (point at which cycling enters his life)

properties.supplied_material: Non-looking at what he himself is feeling

properties.act: At Pace's age eleven, tied a rope from his car to the bike's headstock and dragged him for fun, causing compound femur fracture and road rash
properties.wounding_core: Decided Pace's pain doesn't count; used him for an experience without his say

properties.supplied_material: Non-looking at what he himself is feeling

relationships.relationship: past relationship / site of habit formation

properties.significance: First-love loss was where the work of integration was offered and not-looking was adopted as adaptation

properties.inheritance: Source of the vow against premature declaration — modeled love-as-currency, the word given and withheld for leverage

relationships.properties: The vow against premature declaration is inherited from the mother's love-as-currency wound.

properties.detail: Brooke 'guesses' him down to engineering as a put-down during the walk-of-shame

properties.effect: produced non-consent=coercion equation; organizing refusal of Pace's adult self; consent-architecture built against him
produced non-looking at his own interior and vow against premature declaration
the formative wound; produced the long-range planner
properties.outcome: ended for no cause he could name

properties.nature: measures each transgression to her yes and each advance against her response

properties.basis: Sexual disarming — Sheri could trust Pace to dance with her and not hit on her, letting her be near him safely

properties.reason: Vee carries the densest rule-cluster Pace is likely to meet

properties.note: Rides side by side with Sheri, moving, no eye contact — the only social configuration that costs him nothing; gave Sheri the identical patent monologue on a bike ride

properties.context: They discussed making Vee the third party in the configuration
properties.duration: Had been sleeping with her for a year

properties.basis: attraction to her beauty and leadership status (senior sister, Standards board seat)

relationships.properties: Transforms Randi at the same resolution as Vee across the year, parallel-and-opposite. Randi's apparatus does not integrate because hers was organized against producing hunger at all; the novelty for her is the need itself.

properties.detail: Her status-scanner misreads his height, concealed strength, and truck in a frat-party lineup; she looks down on his truck as can't-afford-better
Randi corrects up to math and it falls flat

properties.note: subject of his embodied recognition; named alongside Vee as the women whose actions reach him

properties.loop_type: closed structural loop of mutually summoning destructive appetites

properties.note: The friendship and the love run partly on this mutual misreading
properties.shared_shape: habituated refusal on the same architectural shape, in different registers
properties.pace_register: refusal to read the emotional after-register
properties.mutual_recognition: each recognizes the other's refusal as character rather than habit

properties.basis: Runs partly on mutual misreading of each other's refusal as character

properties.status: Was sleeping with Randi; did not end the relationship when the configuration began to involve Vee
properties.context: He and Randi discussed making Vee a third

relationships.relationship: associated figure who activates his blind spot

properties.significance: the point at which the hole in his consent-architecture began to matter

relationships.properties: Pace operates in the register of architecture/rules/framework (B&D as structure) while Randi operates in a register Pace cannot access (implied: suffering/sadism); each operates in a register the other cannot access

properties.reason: the regret's interior rearranging was visually indistinguishable from natural scene-resolution; his apparatus was not asking about flight

properties.asymmetry: Vee experienced his privacy as being hidden; he experienced it as giving her the most intimate access he gives anyone — both true, an unresolved wound
properties.information_gap: Reader sees more than Pace does in declaration-adjacent moments; this unequal information drives porch-scene-style scenes

properties.detail: Vee is math-track and can read the shape of the office work if not the content — recognition, not dazzlement, and its own intimacy

properties.effect_on_him: Relaxes his alertness; being with her is genuinely restful
properties.scar_knowledge: Sees his scar early as a body-fact, asks once at most, receives almost nothing

properties.harm: The vow in service of her welfare produced the wound that drove her away
properties.mode: Declares through deeds, never verbally; waits for certainty before words
properties.duration: Both constraints hold throughout the year and never produce a verbal declaration
properties.mismatch: Vee experiences the not-saying as withholding within contemporary convention expecting verbal declaration first; the mismatch is structural

relationships.relationship: romantic/sexual partner he suspects he loves

properties.dynamic: Uses her need/offering to move her past resistances under a benefactor self-story
properties.tension: Ambiguity at the porch is sand-in-the-gears accumulating toward the Christmas fight
properties.vow_constraint: Cannot say 'I love you' due to a vow; routes her love-declaration into a warm sexual response

properties.meaning: She calls the true/foundational self that could still say 'I love you'; the name is the 'I love you' neither can otherwise produce — she says the true name, he can't say the true sentence

relationships.properties: Transforms Vee at the same resolution as Randi across the year. Vee's apparatus integrates because she has always had the relational equipment hunger requires; the novelty for her is the size of the need and the satiety produced. Cracker-and-meal: Vee was always hungering and eating crackers; Pace fed her a meal that both fed the hunger and clarified its specifications.

properties.detail: Gifts (ivory nightie, farmers-market peaches) cost him precisely because money is real and limited; Vee's family would respect his buy-quality instinct; geography prevents Vee from casually spying

properties.note: subject of his embodied recognition; named alongside Randi as the women whose actions reach him

properties.basis: the plan crystallizes later; the meet-cute IS engineered (pointing game)

properties.nature: The seeing is the love and the love is real; she lets him see her
properties.consequence: His careful attention produces trust that lets rule-breaking alter her permanently; depth of love equals depth of damage
properties.available_unused_action: Harder questions with Vee — an honorable exit he did not take

properties.loop_type: closed structural loop among three destructive appetites

properties.distinction: Vee's apparatus is locally relocatable/revisable and lets her walk out; Pace's apparatus does not have this property

properties.nature: Vee's contemporary convention expects verbal declaration; Pace declares through deeds; in her convention the deeds are not the speaking she is waiting for

properties.agency_violation: Withholding information she needed to decide is itself an agency-violation, by his own framework
properties.withheld_information: Did not tell her he had been sleeping with Randi or that they discussed making her a third

properties.interaction_note: In the porch scene, Vee delivers a displaced 'I love you' via a cracker-and-meal speech; Pace hears and understands it whole but reroutes it as sexual compatibility rather than reciprocating directly

relationships.relationship: former romantic partner (cast as 'the princess' in his framework)

properties.his_interpretation: Within his chivalric grammar he 'won' her fairly; he later concludes she 'was not finally the lady'
properties.interpretation_validity: His reading of her is wrong

properties.moral_framing: the calibration is the engine of the harm; the trade was correct on the terms available at the time, and the novel does not soften this
properties.offer_content: a year of the best sex of her life
properties.structural_nature: calibrated to be undeclinable / the best offer of her life

properties.note: Vee could read the whole man off the shoe rack before he says a word; her working-class framework repeatedly supplies the wrong category (canned-peaches misread, dance-partner jealousy, expected-repetitive-meal misread)

negations.claim: Peter's commercial intolerance is aesthetic distaste / the stock Sensitive-Intellectual 'loves old movies, hates ads' trope
negations.correct_statement: It is a neurological tell — the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant

negations.claim: Peter is boastful when discussing his patent
negations.correct_statement: He is not boasting; he'd be equally delighted explaining it to an empty room, eyes on the thing not the listener

negations.claim: Peter rides a carbon-road or mountain bicycle
negations.correct_statement: He rides a modest hybrid bicycle — the practical middle

negations.claim: Peter cannot cook / does not know how to cook
negations.correct_statement: He can plainly cook well; he just doesn't cook for himself

negations.claim: Peter owns a lot / has an extensive material life
negations.correct_statement: He owns almost nothing, but nothing wrong — one correct purpose-built item per domain

negations.claim: Peter will feed Vee the same repetitive chicken-and-frozen-vegetables meal
negations.correct_statement: Vee braces for this and is wrong — her working-class framework supplies the wrong category
